title: Projects
select_or_new: Select a project on the right or create a new one.
delete_confirm:
Delete project "{{name}}"?

Includes project agent, workspace, and all sessions.

specialists.description: Which specialists can the project agent call via ask_agent?
specialists.no_agentlink: AgentLink is not configured — specialists cannot be called.

notes.hint: Markdown notes, briefing or context for this project.

overrides.title: Project Overrides
overrides.mcp_hint: Empty = agent default MCPs. Comma-separated server IDs.
overrides.plugins_hint: Empty = all active plugins. Comma-separated plugin names.
overrides.api_key_hint: Overrides the global LLM provider key for this project.

servers.none_available: No free VMs / containers — create some under /vms or /containers first.
servers.unassign_confirm: Remove server from project? (the server itself stays)

sessions.empty: No sessions in this project yet.

git.not_initialized: No git repository in this workspace.
git.no_repos: No repos in this workspace yet.
git.add_repo_title: Add a new repo to this project
git.repo_name_invalid: Invalid — only a-z, 0-9, _ and -, max 50 chars, not "_root".
git.delete_confirm: Remove repo "{{name}}" from this project? Including all local changes.
git.danger_zone_hint: This permanently deletes the local workspace contents.

settings.danger_zone: Danger zone — these actions cannot be undone.

samba.title: SMB Share
samba.hint: Login info: see System page → SMB Shares. Samba must be set up on the system.
samba.hint_inline: Login is the same for all enabled projects. Samba must be set up on the system (see System page).
